author: anon-581fd578
content: Decision: wgpu is already a dependency of vitreous_render (v29). Adding pollster to vitreous_platform for blocking async wgpu init. Will create gpu.rs in vitreous_platform with GpuContext struct that owns wgpu Device/Surface/Queue/Pipelines. The BatchBuilder and instance types from vitreous_render are already GPU-ready (Pod+Zeroable). Shaders are complete. Approach: (1) add wgpu+pollster to vitreous_platform deps, (2) create gpu.rs with full wgpu integration, (3) wire text shaping into flatten_node_to_render, (4) connect GpuContext to event loop.
